goal: Expose state graph artifact, reproducibility, fixture-suite, and dirty-worktree metadata as machine-readable JSON without scraping the human artifact report.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Graph artifact reports include artifact URIs, linked evals and patches, replay commands, fixture-suite counts, dirty-worktree evidence, and relation provenance, but CI and release scripts must parse human text to assert artifact lineage.
